title: ProtocolLab Adapter Conformance Suite Verification
scope: This verification covers the deterministic adapter conformance and schema validation proof surface only. It does not claim real protocol adapter coverage, Docker requirement changes, or runner coupling to protocol assemblies.
verification_method: Run the adapter conformance and schema-focused tests against the fake adapter host and deterministic handler-backed probes, then run the full solution build and test suite and validate the repository with Workbench.
preconditions: The fake adapter host exposes the ProtocolLab Adapter Contract v1 control plane.
The repository still keeps the runner implementation-neutral.
procedure: Run the adapter conformance and schema-focused test filters to prove the harness against the fake host and handler-backed probes.
expected_result: The conformance suite passes against the fake adapter fixture, rejects malformed and unsupported responses explicitly, distinguishes infrastructure and timeout failures, and remains fully documented without introducing real protocol implementations.
evidence: `dotnet build Incursa.ProtocolLab.sln --no-restore` completed successfully with 0 warnings and 0 errors.
`dotnet test Incursa.ProtocolLab.sln --no-build` passed 167/167 tests, including the new adapter conformance and schema validation coverage.
status_summary: Verification passed for the adapter conformance suite and schema validation layer.
